name: invoice-organizer
description: Automatically organizes invoices and receipts for tax preparation by reading messy files, extracting key information, renaming them consistently, and sorting them into logical folders. Turns hours of manual bookkeeping into minutes of automated organization.
capabilities: Reads PDF invoices and image receipts to extract vendor names, dates, and amounts
Renames files to standardized format: YYYY-MM-DD Vendor - Invoice - Description.pdf
Organizes documents into folders by vendor, category, date period, or tax type
Creates CSV spreadsheets with all invoice details for accountants
Handles multiple file formats including PDF, JPG, PNG, and screenshots
Identifies duplicates and flags files with missing information for review
author: davila7
securitySummary: This is a pure documentation skill (SKILL.md only) with no executable code. All 81 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES: backticks are markdown formatting, 'ransomware' keywords are ordinary business terms, and 'cryptographic' flags are triggered by words like 'invoice'. The skill uses standard Claude Code file operations for legitimate invoice organization.
valueStatement: Manually sorting invoices and receipts takes hours of tedious bookkeeping. This skill automatically reads your files, extracts key information like dates and vendors, renames everything consistently, and sorts documents into logical folders.
limitations: Cannot process password-protected or encrypted PDF files
Image recognition quality depends on document clarity and scan quality
Does not connect to accounting software APIs for automatic import

useCases.title: Tax preparation made simple
useCases.description: Turn a messy downloads folder into organized, accountant-ready records in minutes instead of hours.

useCases.title: Client document processing
useCases.description: Quickly organize scattered invoices from multiple clients into consistent, standardized filing structures.

useCases.title: Personal expense management
useCases.description: Keep track of personal and business expenses by automatically categorizing receipts by type and date.

promptTemplates.title: Basic organization
promptTemplates.prompt: Organize these invoices. Read all files, rename them to YYYY-MM-DD Vendor - Invoice format, and organize by vendor.

promptTemplates.title: Tax preparation
promptTemplates.prompt: Prepare these invoices for tax season. Extract dates, amounts, and vendors. Sort into Deductible/ and Personal/ folders. Create a CSV summary.

promptTemplates.title: Monthly expenses
promptTemplates.prompt: Organize last month's receipts by category (Software, Office, Travel). Calculate totals per category and export to CSV.

promptTemplates.title: Archive cleanup
promptTemplates.prompt: I have five years of mixed invoices. Create a structure by Year/Category/Vendor. Rename all files consistently and flag any duplicates.

bestPractices: Keep original files backed up before reorganization, especially for important tax documents
Use consistent naming and folder structures that match your accounting software requirements
Review the generated CSV summary before sharing with your accountant
antiPatterns: Do not use for sensitive financial documents without first verifying extraction accuracy
Avoid processing documents with personal information in shared or public folders
Do not rely solely on automated extraction for audit-critical tax documents without manual verification

faq.question: What file formats does this skill support?
faq.answer: The skill works with PDF invoices, scanned receipts (JPG, PNG), email attachments, screenshots, and bank statement exports.

faq.question: Can this skill process encrypted PDFs?
faq.answer: No. Password-protected and encrypted PDFs cannot be read. You will need to provide unencrypted versions.

faq.question: Does this skill integrate with QuickBooks or Xero?
faq.answer: The skill creates CSV files compatible with most accounting software, but does not connect directly to APIs.

faq.question: Is my financial data safe?
faq.answer: The skill only reads files you specify and processes everything locally. No data is sent to external servers.

faq.question: What happens if information cannot be read?
faq.answer: Files with unclear information are flagged and moved to a Needs-Review folder for manual handling.

faq.question: How is this different from manual organization?
faq.answer: The skill reads document content to extract actual dates, amounts, and vendors rather than relying on confusing filenames.
